title: Review: Disclosure Day is big on action, light on ideas
summary: A review of the film Disclosure Day praising its entertainment value and direction while noting it lacks originality or fresh perspectives on its subject matter.
content: There's nothing new or surprising, but it's still an entertaining film from one of our greatest directors.

zh.title: 影评：《披露日》动作十足但创意不足
zh.summary: 对电影《披露日》的影评，称赞其娱乐价值和导演手法，但指出其缺乏原创性和对主题的新鲜视角。

title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
summary: State attorneys general are investigating OpenAI regarding its advertising policies and handling of health data, though the specific states involved remain unclear.
content: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.

zh.title: OpenAI面临州检察长调查
zh.summary: 州检察长正在调查OpenAI的广告政策和健康数据处理方式，但涉及的具体州仍不明确。

title: Microsoft hasn’t ruled out spinning off Xbox
summary: Microsoft is evaluating major restructuring options for Xbox, including potential layoffs and the possibility of spinning it off as a separate company or selling the business entirely.
content:
Asha Sharma. | Image: The Verge, Microsoft	

Microsoft is preparing to lay off a significant chunk of its Xbox division and is reevaluating the plans for its next-generation Project Helix console. It's apparently also considering dramatically restructuring its relationship with Xbox, and hasn't ruled out spinning it off into a separate company. 
A new report from The Information suggests that Microsoft has considered some dramatic measures to make its Xbox unit more sustainable. That includes turning it into a wholly owned subsidiary, a joint venture, or even spinning it off entirely, with the possibility of selling the business. The report doesn't suggest anything is imminent, but it …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软未排除分拆Xbox的可能性
zh.summary: 微软正在评估Xbox的重大重组方案，包括潜在裁员和将其分拆为独立公司或完全出售该业务的可能性。

title: This thin under-pillow speaker helped me fall asleep without earbuds
summary: A review of a thin under-pillow speaker designed as a comfortable alternative to earbuds for people who use audio assistance to fall asleep.
content: I’ve struggled with insomnia since I was very young. Like many chronic overthinkers, I tend to fall asleep best when my mind is occupied by something else, such as podcasts, YouTube compilations, or my personal favorite: rain sounds. But earbuds can be uncomfortable, and playing audio out loud isn’t exactly considerate when I’m staying at […]

zh.title: 这款薄型枕下扬声器帮我在没有耳塞的情况下入睡
zh.summary: 对一款薄型枕下扬声器的评论,该产品作为耳塞的舒适替代品,为依靠音频辅助入睡的人设计。

title: Bose’s latest QuietComfort Ultra are $70 off, marking a new low price
summary: Bose's second-generation QuietComfort Ultra headphones are now at a new low price of $379 ($70 off), featuring improved noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and new Cinema Mode for immersive audio.
content:
Bose’s latest QuietComfort Ultra headphones fold down for easy storage. | Image: Bose	

If you’re planning on traveling anytime soon, Bose’s second-generation QuietComfort Ultra headphones are a great companion for long flights and train rides. Not only do they offer excellent noise cancellation, but they also retain the foldable design of their predecessor, making them easy to pack in a carry-on. They’re even easier to recommend today, now that they’ve dropped to a new low price of $379 ($70 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart. 
Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones (second-gen)

Where to Buy:

 $449 $379 at Amazon
 $449 $379 at Walmart
 $449 $379 at Best Buy

The over-ears improve upon their predecessor with better noise cancellation and support for lossless audio over a USB-C cable, allowing you to enjoy higher-quality sound from compatible devices. Bose also added a new Cinema Mode that helps make movies and TV shows feel more immersive while making dialogue easier to hear, along with an improved transparency mode that surpasses the predecessor’s capabilities of reducing sudden loud noises. Battery life is better too, with the headphones lasting up to 30 hours on a single charge — a six-hour increase over the first-generation model. 
Bose has also added a few other conveniences, including the ability to automatically enter a low-power standby mode when stored in the included case or laid flat. Plus, the headphones automatically power on and reconnect to a paired device when you put them on. At the same time, the new model retains soft ear cups and a comfortable, lightweight design that’s easy to wear for hours a time. Support for multipoint Bluetooth pairing remains as well, allowing you to stay connected to two devices simultaneously, so you can watch a video on your laptop and answer calls from your phone.

zh.title: Bose最新QuietComfort Ultra降价70美元,创下新低
zh.summary: Bose第二代QuietComfort Ultra耳机现已降至379美元的新低价(优惠70美元),拥有改进的降噪功能、30小时电池续航和新的沉浸式音频Cinema Mode。

title: My first 24 hours with Siri AI on the Mac
summary: An early look at Apple's new Siri AI in macOS 27's developer beta shows promising improvements that may change perspectives on Apple's voice assistant capabilities.
content:
I turned off Siri on the Mac years ago and never looked back. Similarly, I found Apple Intelligence so fruitless I never engage with it. But the new Siri AI coming to macOS 27 Golden Gate has at least got me slightly rethinking things.
I'm still early in testing Siri AI, as I've only had access to it in the macOS 27 developer beta for little more than 24 hours. It's also in an early preview state on the dev beta, so there should be lots of runway for improvements before it releases later this year. I don't even know if it's done indexing my files and folders on our review unit M5 MacBook Air and M5 Max MacBook Pro. Unlike on the iOS 27 dev  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我在Mac上使用Siri AI的前24小时
zh.summary: 对macOS 27开发者测试版中苹果新Siri AI的早期评测表明了有希望的改进,可能会改变人们对苹果语音助手能力的看法。

title: Never Post’s Mike Rugnetta on the creative process and the value of reliable power
summary: A profile of creator Mike Rugnetta, who balances multiple roles including hosting the popular podcast Never Post while managing a demanding creative schedule.
content:
Mike Rugnetta is a writer, podcast host, producer, audio engineer, educator, musician, sound designer, and father. In short, the man wears a lot of hats. He's the cocreator and host of the award-winning Never Post, an absolutely must-listen podcast about the internet, as well as Fun City, a TTRPG podcast where he's the GM. He's also hosted two different Crash Course series and PBS's Idea Channel. 
If you're thinking that sounds like a lot, you're not wrong. It made us want to know how Mike stays focused with so much on his plate, and what tools are most indispensable to him with his hectic schedule. But, what we got was so much more than th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Never Post的Mike Rugnetta谈创意流程与可靠电源的价值
zh.summary: 创意人Mike Rugnetta的专题报道，他在多个角色之间保持平衡，包括主持热门播客《Never Post》，同时处理繁重的创意工作。

title: My yard is dying, so I made an app for that
summary: A personal account of using Google's Gemini AI to quickly generate a functional yard care app, demonstrating both the potential and current limitations of AI-assisted app development.
content:
When I returned to my computer five minutes after giving Gemini a lengthy prompt, I had two things: a functional app in a preview window, and a message about a bug.
"~ Channel is unrecoverably broken and will be disposed!" Sounded bad! But right below it was a button to fix the bug. Pretty weird that I just instructed a computer to build a whole app for me with a single prompt, but it needed me to click a button to fix a bug. I did anyway, and in 233 seconds Gemini reported back that it had succeeded, using words like "blockages" and "race conditions." I didn't understand a bit of it. It was thrilling.
This was my second or third attempt a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我的院子快死了，所以我做了个应用
zh.summary: 一个个人经历分享，讲述如何利用谷歌Gemini AI快速开发一个功能完整的草坪护理应用，展示了AI辅助应用开发的潜力和当前局限。

title: Anthropic cuts off Fable 5 and Mythos 5 access following government order
summary: Anthropic has cut off all access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models following a government order citing national security concerns, despite the company's assertion that identified vulnerabilities were minor.
content:
On Friday evening, the government ordered Anthropic to block access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all foreign nations, both inside and outside the US, due to national security concerns. That order included employees of Anthropic. To meet those demands, the company has completely cut off access to the models for all customers.
In a statement, Anthropic said that while it was complying with the order, the government "did not provide specific details of its national security concern." Instead, it claims that any evidence of potential jailbreak was provided verbally, and that the vulnerabilities discovered were minor and available via other model …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic根据政府命令切断了Fable 5和Mythos 5的访问权限
zh.summary: Anthropic根据政府命令切断了对其Fable 5和Mythos 5模型的所有访问权限，该命令涉及国家安全问题，尽管Anthropic公司声称发现的漏洞轻微。

title: Echo Isle is a pint-sized adventure inspired by classic Zelda
summary: Echo Isle is a retro-styled adventure game heavily inspired by The Legend of Zelda, featuring similar graphics, mechanics, and character design from Link's Awakening. The game condenses the classic Zelda adventure formula into a brisk experience, completing in just over an hour. Players guide the protagonist through dungeons on an island where a magical lighthouse has mysteriously darkened.
content:
Echo Isle is heavily inspired by The Legend of Zelda, and it's not afraid to show it: The retro graphics bear a striking resemblance to Link's Awakening, the main character wears a blue tunic and wields a sword, and he navigates dungeons to collect items and keys to fight bosses and gather magical MacGuffins. But where Echo Isle shines is how it takes the best parts of a Zelda adventure and shrinks them down to their essence - I finished the game in a little more than an hour. 
The game starts with the main character falling from the sky onto Echo Isle, an island protected by a magical lighthouse that has mysteriously gone dark. While you d …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 回声岛：受经典塞尔达启发的迷你冒险游戏
zh.summary: 回声岛是一款复古风格的冒险游戏，深受《塞尔达传说》启发，采用与《梦见岛》相似的画面、机制和角色设计。该游戏将经典塞尔达冒险公式浓缩为快节奏体验，耗时仅一小时多。玩家引导主角在岛屿的地下城中探险，该岛的神秘灯塔已陷入黑暗。

title: Apple’s new AI photo editing tools mostly work, for better and worse
summary: Apple has introduced its first native AI photo editing tools to iPhones through iOS 27's developer beta, marking a significant shift in what the native Photos app can accomplish. While less advanced than Google's Pixel implementation, these tools represent an important inflection point for iPhone photography capabilities. The features are still in testing and may be refined before public release.
content:
iPhone owners are getting real, native AI photo editing for the first time.	

The most popular camera in the world just got its first set of serious AI photo editing features, and I don't think any of us are ready.
As far as AI photo editing goes, the new features in iOS 27 are pretty tame compared to what you can do on, say, Google's Pixel phones. But for the iPhone, they represent a tipping point in what the native photos app allows you to do to your photos. I mean memories. I mean, I don't know anymore.
These new features are part of the iOS 27 developer beta right now, so bear in mind that Apple may continue making tweaks to them before they're released to the general public. There are three, or maybe two and a  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果新AI图片编辑工具效果参差不齐
zh.summary: 苹果通过iOS 27开发者测试版在iPhone上推出首款原生AI图片编辑工具，标志着照片应用功能的重大进步。虽然不如谷歌Pixel实现那么先进，但这些工具代表了iPhone摄影能力的关键转折点。这些功能目前仍在测试中，公开发布前可能会进一步优化。

title: A better way to manage all your screenshots
summary: This guide explores strategies and tools for organizing the ever-growing collection of screenshots that accumulate on modern devices. As screenshots become an increasingly common way to save information and share content, effective management systems become critical for productivity and digital organization. The piece covers various approaches to streamline screenshot storage and retrieval.
content:
Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 132, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, happy soccer, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.)
This week, I've been preparing for a month of getting absolutely nothing done during the World Cup. I've also been reading about Steven Spielberg and wearables and the Boeing 747, overloading on computer nostalgia thanks to The Virtual OS Museum, watching that Knicks game winner over and over and over, listening to the fabulous new This Was SportsCenter podcast and the fabulous old The Renner Files podcast, and trying to tame my …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 管理截图的更好方法
zh.summary: 本指南探讨了整理现代设备中不断增长的截图集合的策略和工具。随着截图成为保存信息和共享内容的越来越普遍的方式，有效的管理系统对生产力和数字组织变得至关重要。文章涵盖了简化截图存储和检索的各种方法。

title: Threads of underground fungal networks are long enough to reach beyond the Solar System
summary: Researchers have quantified the vast scale of arbuscular mycorrhizal fungal networks, discovering that their combined length would extend far beyond the boundaries of the Solar System. These underground fungal threads play crucial ecological roles in nutrient exchange with plant roots, making them essential to terrestrial ecosystems. The study provides new perspective on the hidden biological infrastructure supporting life on Earth.
content: Researchers have quantified the length and mass of arbuscular mycorrhizal fungal networks globally.

zh.title: 地下真菌网络线程足够长，可以延伸到太阳系之外
zh.summary: 研究人员已经量化了丛枝菌根真菌网络的巨大规模，发现其总长度将远远超越太阳系的边界。这些地下真菌线程在与植物根部的养分交换中发挥着关键的生态作用，使其成为陆地生态系统的必需品。该研究为支撑地球生命的隐藏生物基础设施提供了新的视角。

title: The FBI built its own replica small town to simulate real-world cyberattacks
summary: The FBI has constructed a replica small town within a building in Alabama to serve as a dedicated cyber training facility for law enforcement and security professionals. The simulated environment allows agents to practice defending against real-world cyberattack scenarios in a controlled setting. This innovative training approach helps prepare cyber defenders for threats targeting critical infrastructure and government systems.
content: Hidden inside a building in Alabama, the FBI has created its own small town as a dedicated cyber training ground for simulating cyberattacks.

zh.title: FBI建立了自己的复制小镇来模拟真实网络攻击
zh.summary: FBI在阿拉巴马州的一栋建筑内建造了一个复制小镇，作为执法部门和安全专业人员的专门网络培训设施。该模拟环境允许特工在受控环境中练习防御真实网络攻击场景。这种创新的培训方法有助于为网络防御者准备应对针对关键基础设施和政府系统的威胁。

title: The future of Hollywood isn’t feeding prompts into vanilla gen AI models
summary: Despite industry enthusiasm about generative AI's potential to transform filmmaking, few AI-created projects have achieved the quality or cultural impact of traditional entertainment. Current AI video models remain limited to short clips with visual inconsistencies, and several high-profile Hollywood partnerships have dissolved unexpectedly. The article suggests studios are exploring AI integration, but practical applications currently remain limited to short-form content.
content:
Concept art from Dear Upstairs Neighbors that used to train custom builds of Google’s Veo and Imagen models. | Image: Google DeepMind	

For all the noise that's been made about how generative AI is poised to revolutionize the filmmaking industry, there haven't really been any projects created with the technology that felt like the sort of entertainment people would pay to see. Most AI firms' video models are still only capable of churning out short bursts of visually inconsistent footage. And some of Hollywood's biggest AI partnerships have suddenly evaporated in ways that make it seem like studios might not be able to rely on the new technology coming out of Silicon Valley. For the most part, short-form video slop appears to be the only thing that major production houses ar …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 好莱坞的未来不是向普通生成式AI模型输入提示词
zh.summary: 尽管业界对生成式AI改变电影制作的潜力充满热情，但很少有AI创建的项目达到传统娱乐的质量或文化影响力。目前的AI视频模型仍限于短视频和视觉不一致的问题，几个高调的好莱坞合作伙伴关系已意外解散。该文章表明工作室正在探索AI集成，但实际应用目前仍限于短期内容。

title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
summary: Andrew Yang identifies housing, food, and wireless service as areas where Americans overpay and sees startup opportunities in reducing consumer costs. This reflects growing concerns about cost-of-living pressures affecting consumer spending and economic opportunity.
content: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

zh.title: 安德鲁·杨认为下一个大创业机会是降低生活成本
zh.summary: 安德鲁·杨指出住房、食品和无线服务是美国人支付过高的领域，并看到了降低消费者成本的创业机会。这反映了人们对生活成本压力影响消费支出和经济机会的日益关注。

title: Anthropic shuts down Fable, Mythos models following Trump admin directive
summary: Anthropic has discontinued its Fable and Mythos AI models following a Trump administration Commerce Department directive citing national security concerns over a potential 'jailbreak' vulnerability. The action marks government intervention in commercial AI product availability.
content: Commerce dept. worries that a Fable 5 "jailbreak" could be a national security threat.

zh.title: Anthropic根据特朗普政府指令关闭Fable和Mythos模型
zh.summary: Anthropic因应特朗普政府商务部的指令，以国家安全问题为由停止了其Fable和Mythos AI模型，理由是存在潜在的"越狱"漏洞。这一举动标志着政府对商业AI产品可用性的干预。

title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
summary: The Trump administration ordered the recall of Anthropic's most powerful AI model based on a narrow potential jailbreak vulnerability, prompting the company to dispute the decision and argue the concern doesn't justify withdrawing a widely-deployed product. The dispute highlights tensions between government oversight and commercial AI development.
content: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.

zh.title: Anthropic的安全警告可能适得其反——政府关闭了其最强大的AI
zh.summary: 特朗普政府因一个狭隘的潜在越狱漏洞下令召回Anthropic最强大的AI模型，促使该公司对该决定提出异议，并辩称这一顾虑不足以证明撤回广泛部署的产品的合理性。这一争议突显了政府监督与商业AI开发之间的紧张关系。

title: Valve just imported 13 tons of VR headsets in one day
summary: Valve received approximately 13 tons of Virtual Reality Devices in a June 10th shipment, likely representing the first mass production units of its new Steam Frame gaming headset. The large-scale import signals Valve's significant entry into the consumer VR hardware market.
content:
On June 10th, the German container ship Posen docked in Los Angeles after a two-week voyage from Shanghai. As Valve watcher Brad Lynch notes, it was almost certainly carrying the first mass production shipments of the Steam Frame, Valve's new gaming headset. 
Import records show that Valve's distribution partner Ceva offloaded nearly 32 metric tons of "Virtual Reality Devices" on Valve's behalf - or roughly 13 tons of actual product, after you subtract the roughly 3,700 kilogram weight of five 40-foot shipping containers. 
That's the same math we used to estimate that Valve imported 50 tons of game consoles in two days last month - and sin …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve 一天内进口了13吨VR头显
zh.summary: Valve在6月10日的一批货物中收到了约13吨虚拟现实设备，可能代表其新型Steam Frame游戏头显的首批大规模生产单位。这次大规模进口标志着Valve正在大举进入消费级VR硬件市场。
